title: Fan Rotom Battle Guide
summary: An [Electric]/[Flying] pivot with both [levitate] and type-based [Ground] immunity — [air-slash] flinch utility plus reliable [thunderbolt] damage.
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Fan Rotom is unique for having two sources of [Ground] immunity — [levitate] and the [Flying] type itself. Even [mold-breaker] users cannot land [earthquake] because the [Flying] typing still blocks it. [air-slash] provides a flinch-based tempo plan that works well in doubles, and [thunderbolt] keeps the Rotom damage package intact.

## Strengths
The double [Ground] immunity is the defining advantage — no Rotom form is safer against [Ground] attackers. [air-slash] 30% flinch chance lets Fan Rotom gamble on tempo steals, and it's one of the few special attackers with a strong [Flying] STAB. [volt-switch] maintains pivot momentum.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Ice] and [Rock] are live weaknesses. [stealth-rock] is a problem — it chips 25% HP on entry. 50 HP caps the total defensive ceiling.

## Recommended Moveset
[air-slash] is the flinch tempo move. [thunderbolt] is the reliable [Electric] STAB. [volt-switch] handles pivot plays. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[choice-specs] maximizes raw damage. [sharp-beak] boosts [air-slash] specifically. [levitate] is locked. Tera [Flying] stacks STAB on [air-slash] and patches the [Ground] weakness (already immune) to soften [Rock].

## Teammates & Synergy
Use with hazard removal ([defog] or [rapid-spin]) to protect from [stealth-rock]. Cover [Ice] and [Rock] with [Fire] or [Fighting] partners. [tailwind] support extends the offensive window.

## Play Patterns
Pivot into [Ground] attackers safely, then click [air-slash] for flinch gambles or [thunderbolt] for reliable damage. Use [volt-switch] to escape [Ice] or [Rock] matchups. Keep [stealth-rock] off your side of the field.
